H8101.strongs_def: a Shimathite (collectively) or descendants of Shimah

H8102.derivation: from an unused root meaning to emit a sound;

H8104.strongs_def: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
H8104.kjv_def: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).
H8104.usage: keep(283x), observe(46x), heed(35x), keeper(28x), preserve(21x), beware(9x), mark(8x), watchman(8x), wait(7x), watch(7x), regard(5x), save(2x)

H8105.strongs_def: something preserved, i.e. the settlings (plural only) of wine

H8106.strongs_def: Shemer, the name of three Israelites

H8108.derivation: feminine of an unused noun from H8104 (שָׁמַר) meaning a guard;

H8109.derivation: feminine of passive participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר);

H8110.derivation: from H8105 (שֶׁמֶר) in its original sense; guardianship;
H8110.strongs_def: Shimron, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine
H8110.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H8111.derivation: from the active participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר); watch-station;

H8112.derivation: from H8110 (שִׁמְרוֹן) and a derivative of H4754 (מָרָא); guard of lashing;

H8113.derivation: from H8105 (שֶׁמֶר) in its original sense; watchful;
H8113.strongs_def: Shimri, the name of four Israelites

H8114.derivation: or שְׁמַרְיָהוּ; from H8104 (שָׁמַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has guarded;
H8114.strongs_def: Shemarjah, the name of four Israelites

H8117.strongs_def: a Shimronite (collectively) or descendants of Shimron

H8118.strongs_def: a Shomeronite (collectively) or inhabitants of Shomeron

H8120.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ) through the idea of activity implied in day-light;

H8121.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be brilliant;
H8121.strongs_def: the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement
H8121.kjv_def: [phrase] east side(-ward), sun (rising), [phrase] west(-ward), window. See also H1053 (בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ).

H8126.derivation: patronymically from an unused name from H7762 (שׁוּם) probably meaning garlic-smell;
H8126.strongs_def: a Shumathite (collectively) or descendants of Shumah

H8127.strongs_def: a tooth (as sharp); specifically  ivory; figuratively, a cliff
H8127.usage: teeth(31x), tooth(10x), ivory(10x), sharp(2x), crag(1x), forefront(1x)

H8134.derivation: probably from H8132 (שָׁנָא) and H1 (אָב); a father has turned;

H8138.strongs_def: to fold, i.e. duplicate (literally or figuratively); by implication, to transmute (transitive or intransitive)
H8138.kjv_def: do (speak, strike) again, alter, double, (be given to) change, disguise, (be) diverse, pervert, prefer, repeat, return, do the second time.
H8138.usage: change(7x), again(3x), diverse(2x), alter(1x), disguise(1x), doubled(1x), pervert(1x), preferred(1x), repeateth(1x)

H8141.strongs_def: a year (as a revolution of time)

H8143.derivation: from H8127 (שֵׁן) and the plural apparently of a foreign word;
H8143.strongs_def: probably, tooth of elephants, i.e. ivory tusk

H8144.strongs_def: crimson, properly, the insect or its color, also stuff dyed with it

H8145.strongs_def: properly, double, i.e. second; also adverbially, again
H8145.usage: second(87x), other(37x), time(13x), again(7x), another(7x), more(3x), either(1x)

H8147.kjv_def: both, couple, double, second, twain, [phrase] twelfth, [phrase] twelve, [phrase] twenty (sixscore) thousand, twice, two.
H8147.usage: two(533x), both(69x), second(10x), twain(7x), twice(5x), double(5x)

H8149.derivation: or שְׂנִיר; from an unused root meaning to be pointed; peak;
H8149.strongs_def: Shenir or Senir, a summit of Lebanon
H8149.pos: proper noun with reference to a mountain

H8150.strongs_def: to point (transitive or intransitive); intensively, to pierce; figuratively, to inculcate

H8156.strongs_def: to split or tear; figuratively, to upbraid

H8158.strongs_def: to cut in pieces, i.e. slaughter

H8159.strongs_def: to gaze at or about (properly, for help); by implication, to inspect, consider, compassionate, be nonplussed (as looking around in amazement) or bewildered
H8159.kjv_def: depart, be dim, be dismayed, look (away), regard, have respect, spare, turn.
H8159.usage: look(5x), respect(3x), dismay(2x), turn(1x), regard(1x), spare(1x), depart(1x)

H8160.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8159 (שָׁעָה);
H8160.strongs_def: properly, a look, i.e. a moment

H8161.derivation: feminine from an unused root meaning to stamp;

H8162.strongs_def: linsey-woolsey, i.e. cloth of linen and wool carded and spun together
H8162.kjv_def: garment of divers sorts, linen and wollen.

H8163.strongs_def: shaggy; as noun, a he-goat; by analogy, a faun
H8163.kjv_def: devil, goat, hairy, kid, rough, satyr.
H8163.usage: kid(28x), goat(24x), devil(2x), satyr(2x), hairy(2x), rough(1x)

H8165.strongs_def: Seir, a mountain of Idumaea and its aboriginal occupants, also one in Palestine
H8165.pos: proper masculine noun, proper noun with reference to a mountain, proper noun with reference to territory

H8168.derivation: from an unused root meaning to hollow out;
H8168.strongs_def: the palm; by extension, a handful

H8169.derivation: or שַׁעֲלַבִּין; plural from H7776 (שׁוּעָל); fox-holes;
H8169.strongs_def: Shaalbim or Shaalabbin, a place in Palestine

H8170.strongs_def: a Shaalbonite or inhabitant of Shaalbin

H8172.kjv_def: lean, lie, rely, rest (on, self), stay.

H8173.strongs_def: (in a good acceptation) to look upon (with complacency), i.e. fondle, please or amuse (self); (in a bad one) to look about (in dismay), i.e. stare
H8173.kjv_def: cry (out) (by confusion with H7768 (שָׁוַע)), dandle, delight (self), play, shut.

H8174.strongs_def: Shaaph, the name of two Israelites

H8175.strongs_def: to storm; by implication, to shiver, i.e. fear
H8175.kjv_def: be (horribly) afraid, fear, hurl as a storm, be tempestuous, come like (take away as with) a whirlwind.

H8176.derivation: a primitive root; to split or open, i.e. (literally, but only as denominative from H8179 (שַׁעַר)); compare see H7778 (שׁוֹעֵר)
H8176.strongs_def: to act as gatekeeper; (figuratively) to estimate

H8178.kjv_def: affrighted, [idiom] horribly, [idiom] sore, storm. See H8181 (שֵׂעָר).

H8179.derivation: from H8176 (שָׁעַר) in its original sense;
H8179.strongs_def: an opening, i.e. door or gate

H8181.derivation: or שַׂעַר; (Isaiah 7:20), from H8175 (שָׂעַר) in the sense of dishevelling;

H8184.derivation: or שְׂעוֹרָה (feminine meaning the plant); and (masculine meaning the grain); also שְׂעֹר; or שְׂעוֹר; from H8175 (שָׂעַר) in the sense of roughness;

H8186.derivation: or שַׁעֲרִירִיָּה; or שַׁעֲרֻרִת; feminine from H8176 (שָׁעַר) in the sense of H8175 (שָׂעַר);

H8187.derivation: from H8176 (שָׁעַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has stormed;

H8188.derivation: masculine plural of H8184 (שְׂעֹרָה); barley grains;

H8193.derivation: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));
H8193.strongs_def: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)
H8193.kjv_def: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.
H8193.usage: lip(112x), bank(10x), brim(8x), edge(8x), language(7x), speech(6x), shore(6x), brink(5x), border(3x), side(3x), prating(2x), vain(2x)

H8194.derivation: from H8192 (שָׁפָה) in the sense of clarifying;
H8194.strongs_def: a cheese (as strained from the whey)

H8195.derivation: or שְׁפִי; from H8192 (שָׁפָה); baldness (compare H8205 (שְׁפִי));

H8197.derivation: or שְׁפוּפָן; from the same as H8207 (שְׁפִיפֹן); serpent-like;

H8198.derivation: feminine from an unused root meaning to spread out (as a family; see H4940 (מִשְׁפָּחָה));
H8198.strongs_def: a female slave (as a member of the household)
H8198.usage: handmaid(29x), maid(12x), maidservant(8x), bondwomen(3x), maiden(3x), womenservants(3x), handmaidens(2x), bondmaid(1x), servant(1x), wench(1x)

H8199.strongs_def: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
H8199.kjv_def: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.
H8199.usage: plead(11x), avenged(2x), condemn(2x), execute(2x), judgment(2x), defend(1x), deliver(1x)
